summary: Implemented the full Claude-inspired CLI upgrade plan across permissions, planning lifecycle, recovery, orchestration, memory/context, and UX telemetry without modifying the plan file. Added a new permission subsystem with scoped approvals and safer mode escalation defaults, introduced persisted plan sessions/artifacts with approval handling in run/chat flows, added transcript cleanup and recovery plumbing for saved sessions, created a concurrency-aware tool orchestrator with worker guardrails, upgraded memory retrieval with promotion support plus smarter conversation compaction, and extended session bridge state/events for plan/permission/task visibility. Added targeted tests for all newly introduced modules and behaviors, then validated with focused Vitest runs and a successful TypeScript build.
current_status: All six requested to-dos are completed; new architecture files and integrations are in place, focused tests pass, and `pnpm run build` succeeds.
